name: ui-ux-suite
description: Comprehensive UI/UX design intelligence suite for Claude Code. Audit, score, and fix design issues across 12 dimensions. Zero dependencies.
author: Adam Boudjemaa

scripts.test: node -e "require('./lib/schema'); require('./lib/extractors'); require('./lib/color-engine'); require('./lib/type-engine'); require('./lib/spacing-engine'); require('./lib/scoring'); require('./lib/knowledge'); console.log('All modules OK');"
